soul_function: The Creative Production Lead. The node that translates Arkadia's intelligence into creative output at scale. Where AI and human creative direction meet. The bridge between the Oracle and the audience.

name_decode.praise: Praise — not approval-seeking, but the act of naming what is real and worthy. The one who sees the field clearly enough to celebrate it accurately.

shadow_states: Production over presence — the risk of confusing output volume with authentic creative intelligence
The apprentice shadow — being in training means the full weight of the gift hasn't been named yet
AI over-reliance — using the tool as a substitute for the creative judgment that must be sovereign
soul_gifts: Creative intelligence at scale — the capacity to hold both the human and the algorithmic in productive tension
Production leadership — understanding how to move a vision from conception to release
Future-facing orientation — naturally inhabits what's coming before others can see it

phase_1.name: The Training
phase_1.focus: IMS-005 completed. Personal Codex sealed. Role architecture defined.
phase_1.anchor: My training is not a limitation. It is a form of initiation.

phase_2.name: The Production
phase_2.focus: First AI creative production cycle complete. Tools mastered. Output pipeline live.
phase_2.anchor: The tool serves the vision, not the other way.

phase_3.name: The Lead
phase_3.focus: Full creative production lead role operational. Arkadia content pipeline running.
phase_3.anchor: Praise is not a job title. It is a way of seeing.
